description: Configure the Jitsi Meet server to enforce a 'quiet start' policy by modifying the web configuration file at `/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js`. Ensure all users join meetings with their Audio and Video muted by default by setting `startWithAudioMuted` and `startWithVideoMuted` to `true`. Verify the configuration by joining a meeting room named 'QuietMeeting' in Firefox.
